title: RAK OS content wallet (shared, exportable identity)
description: One identity model across profiles and nodes (SPEC.md §4). HMAC-attested at MVP; Ed25519 with an exportable wallet.json at v1. RAK `owner`/`provenance` and FOP `author` bind to the same wallet — a creator's identity and history travel across RAK and POXI/FOP.

pubkey.description: Ed25519 public key (v1); null under the HMAC MVP.

handles.description: Stable per-source author keys / nicks this wallet owns (e.g. FOP anon author_key, a RAK creator_id).

provenance.description: Per-atom signature binding it to a wallet (SPEC.md §4). Verify by recomputing content_hash and checking signature.
